basic_details.job_title: IIT Mandi Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Assistant Professor and Associate Professor Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Technology Mandi (IIT Mandi)
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology Mandi (IIT Mandi) Assistant Professor and Associate Professor Notification 2026 has been released on 12 June 2026 on the official IIT Mandi website. The recruitment is being conducted through Advertisement No. IIT Mandi/Fac./Recruit./Specific/SOM/2026/01 for Assistant Professor (Grade-I/Grade-II) and Associate Professor positions.

qualification.education_qualification: Ph.D. in appropriate branch/discipline and first class in the preceding degree with a very good academic record throughout
qualification.details: Assistant Professor (Grade-I/Grade-II): Ph.D. in appropriate branch/discipline and first class in the preceding degree with a very good academic record throughout. Associate Professor: Ph.D. in appropriate branch/discipline and first class in the preceding degree with very good academic record throughout.

salary_details.details: Assistant Professor (Grade-I/Grade-II): Starting Basic Pay Range Rs. 84,700/- to Rs. 1,01,500/- (Basic Pay will be fixed based on relevant Post Ph.D. experience) Associate Professor: Level:13A2, Cell-01 (Starting Basic Pay ₹ 1,39,600/-)

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the IIT Mandi Various Posts Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 03-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIT Mandi to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

all_official_links.label: Download IIT Mandi Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for IIT Mandi recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application form for the Assistant Professor and Associate Professor posts at IIT Mandi is 03-07-2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for these posts?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Ph.D. in the appropriate branch/discipline and have first-class marks in the preceding degree with a very good academic record throughout.

faq.question: Q3. How can I apply for the IIT Mandi recruitment?
faq.answer: Applications must be submitted online through the official IIT Mandi website on or before the closing date.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary structure for Assistant Professor and Associate Professor?
faq.answer: The salary is as per the 7th CPC. For Assistant Professors, the starting basic pay ranges from Rs. 84,700/- to Rs. 1,01,500/-. For Associate Professors, the starting basic pay is ₹ 1,39,600/-.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification released by IIT Mandi.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for these positions?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Assistant Professor and Associate Professor positions at IIT Mandi will primarily involve an Interview.

faq.question: Q7. Where can I find the official notification PDF?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be downloaded from the Important Links section of this article, which will be available on the IIT Mandi website.

faq.question: Q8. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this recruitment is IIT Mandi/Fac./Recruit./Specific/SOM/2026/01.

faq.question: Q9. What is the job type for these positions?
faq.answer: The job type for these positions is Full Time.

faq.question: Q10. Does IIT Mandi recruit for multiple posts in this notification?
faq.answer: Yes, this notification is for the recruitment of Assistant Professor (Grade-I/Grade-II) and Associate Professor posts.
